title: OpenAI 已禁止军事用途。五角大楼无论如何都通过微软测试了其模型
content: 消息人士称，在 ChatGPT 制造商解除对军事应用的禁令之前，国防部曾试验过微软版本的 OpenAI 技术。
original_title: OpenAI Had Banned Military Use. The Pentagon Tested Its Models Through Microsoft Anyway
original_content: Sources allege the Defense Department experimented with Microsoft’s version of OpenAI technology before the ChatGPT-maker lifted its prohibition on military applications.

title: OpenAI 硬件高管 Caitlin Kalinowski 因五角大楼交易而辞职
content: 硬件主管 Caitlin Kalinowski 今天宣布，为了回应 OpenAI 与国防部达成的有争议的协议，她辞去了领导该公司机器人团队的职务。
original_title: OpenAI hardware exec Caitlin Kalinowski quits in response to Pentagon deal
original_content: Hardware executive Caitlin Kalinowski announced today that in response to OpenAI's controversial agreement with the Department of Defense, she’s resigned from her role leading the company's robotics team.

title: Anthropic 与五角大楼的交易对于追逐联邦合同的初创公司来说是一个警示故事
content: 在两国未能就军方应对其人工智能模型拥有多少控制权（包括其在自主武器和大规模国内监控中的使用）达成一致后，五角大楼已正式将 Anthropic 指定为供应链风险。随着 Anthropic 价值 2 亿美元的合同破裂，国防部转向
original_title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
original_content: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. title: 五角大楼交易失败后，克劳德的消费者增长仍在继续
content: Claude 的应用程序现在的新安装量比 ChatGPT 更多，并且其每日活跃用户数也在增长。
original_title: Claude’s consumer growth surge continues after Pentagon deal debacle
original_content: Claude's app is now seeing more new installs than ChatGPT and is growing its daily active users.
